## CheatReader v0.1.17

### Highlights
- Added direct reading-position tools for jumping by line, page, percentage, and text search with previous/next match navigation.
- Added support for user-selected custom fonts directly from the font selector.
- Improved Linux and Ubuntu startup recovery with a dedicated display reset path and a safer multi-line startup default on Ubuntu.

### Notes
- Entering single-line mode now prefers nearby non-empty lines so the reader is less likely to land on a blank transparent row.
- Transparent mode now includes a user-controlled text outline toggle, so readers can keep or remove the readability halo.
- Existing bookshelf data and reading progress continue to work as before.
